name: flash-retrieval
description: Flash P2 — Retrieval & Context service (SQLite source-of-truth + Superlinked SIE semantic layer).

scripts.n8n: dotenv -e .env.local -- cross-env N8N_USER_FOLDER=.n8n-local N8N_BLOCK_ENV_ACCESS_IN_NODE=false N8N_DIAGNOSTICS_ENABLED=false N8N_VERSION_NOTIFICATIONS_ENABLED=false N8N_TEMPLATES_ENABLED=false n8n
scripts.n8n:activate: dotenv -e .env.local -- cross-env N8N_USER_FOLDER=.n8n-local N8N_BLOCK_ENV_ACCESS_IN_NODE=false N8N_DIAGNOSTICS_ENABLED=false N8N_VERSION_NOTIFICATIONS_ENABLED=false N8N_TEMPLATES_ENABLED=false n8n publish:workflow --id=flash-agent-p3
scripts.n8n:import: dotenv -e .env.local -- cross-env N8N_USER_FOLDER=.n8n-local N8N_BLOCK_ENV_ACCESS_IN_NODE=false N8N_DIAGNOSTICS_ENABLED=false N8N_VERSION_NOTIFICATIONS_ENABLED=false N8N_TEMPLATES_ENABLED=false n8n import:workflow --input=Flash-Agent.json
scripts.n8n:start: dotenv -e .env.local -- cross-env N8N_USER_FOLDER=.n8n-local N8N_BLOCK_ENV_ACCESS_IN_NODE=false N8N_DIAGNOSTICS_ENABLED=false N8N_VERSION_NOTIFICATIONS_ENABLED=false N8N_TEMPLATES_ENABLED=false n8n start
